subject: A humanoid figure in close-up, a curved blade pressed flat against the forehead, blood trickling from a cut — smiling with calm menace
description: An extreme close-up of a humanoid figure's face, hair loose and dark, a curved blade held horizontally across the forehead with a thin line of blood where it nicks the skin. The figure's expression is composed and almost pleased — a controlled, self-assured smile. The background is a soft purple-lavender out-of-focus glow suggesting an indoor or forest setting at night. The blade is clearly visible but the hand gripping its far end is partially cropped. The image reads as a deliberate self-display of danger rather than a combat scene.
foreground: Humanoid figure with blade pressed to forehead, blood visible
background: Soft purple-lavender blur, suggestion of vertical shapes
